steps.title: Look for a decline
steps.content: The researcher claims that some northern freshwater lakes had fewer days of surface ice by the mid-2000s than they had in the early 1980s. A typical example must compare the same lake across those two winters.

steps.title: Reject nondecline examples
steps.content: A reports only 2005-06 data. C shows Spirit Lake with more ice later, not fewer. D reports only 1980-81 data. The remaining option compares Kitusjarvi across both winters and shows fewer days later. The answer is B.
